title: family guy texture pack
description: makes some textures family guy characters
body:
# Overview:
Changes some textures to be family guy characters. also changes their in-game name in US-english. If you don't want that, then you'll have to change it to British English, I think that's the easiest fix

## heres the list:
- Suspicious stewie
- Phantom membrian
- Amethyst cristal 
- RePeter
- Megma block
- Lapis lasouis

you'll probably figure out what the actual items are, but if not, you can look in the gallery
Also I noticed that you can update descriptions without them having reviewd which I think is kind of funny, so I could be spamming slurs rn.








plz don't make me do the description over I swear I tried
